name: flusso
description: Work with flusso (Postgres → OpenSearch declarative sync) end to end. Type /flusso:expert for an expert that explains how it works and drives the work: author schemas (*.schema.yml + flusso.toml), understand the Postgres source and OpenSearch sink, query the index from Rust with #[derive(FlussoDocument)], integrate/migrate a deployment, and contribute to the codebase.
